data.title: Orlando Health Sciences University renamed to honor Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel, solidifying its status as a top institution. Dec. 11, 2025. #PRNewswire
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on December 11, 2025, the Board of Directors of the institution formerly identified as Orlando Health Sciences University, which is the overseeing entity of the Orlando College of Osteopathic Medicine (OCOM), the most recent medical school in Florida, made a significant announcement.

data.title: CAE wins contract to provide Australia with Future Air Mission Training System under Project AIR5428 Phase 3 for RAAF.
data.description: Today in Sydney, CAE revealed an important development as it sealed a significant deal with the Commonwealth of Australia. This contract entails the delivery of the Future Air Mission Training System (F-AMTS) as part of Project AIR5428 Phase 3 for the Royal Australian Air Force (RAAF). The agreement, involving CAE (NYSE: CAE) (TSX: CAE), marks a significant milestone for the company and involves a substantial investment from the Australian government.

data.title: Miluna Acquisition Corp to begin separate trading of ordinary shares and warrants starting Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, on December 11, 2025, Miluna Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: MMTXU), a blank check company aimed at merging with other businesses, revealed that holders of the company's units can opt to trade ordinary shares and warrants separately starting around December 15, 2025.

data.title: OpenAI debuts GPT-5.2 with enhancements for STEM tasks, amid increased contracts; firms eye AI for tech jobs.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced the latest version of its artificial intelligence model, GPT-5.2, which includes improvements specifically tailored for scientific, mathematical, and software-related tasks. This release comes at a time when businesses are considering the integration of AI technologies for technical job functions. The upgraded GPT-5.2 is designed to enhance performance in these specialized domains, showcasing OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI capabilities in a variety of fields.

data.title: Yinhawangka Aboriginal Corporation and Rio Tinto sign Interim Modernised Agreement in Perth, Australia.
data.description: In Perth, Australia, the Yinhawangka Aboriginal Corporation and Rio Tinto have recently signed an Interim Modernised Agreement, signaling a significant development in their enduring partnership. This interim agreement expands upon the 2013 Participation Agreement between the Yinhawangka People and Rio Tinto. It outlines the collaborative efforts and lays the groundwork for a comprehensive modernised agreement that will dictate Rio Tinto's activities on Yinhawangka Country in the future. This agreement represents an important step forward in the relationship between the parties.

data.title: RealD & CJ 4DPLEX collaborate to enhance cinematic experience. Regal Cinemas to upgrade 52 sites for Avatar release.
data.description: Regal Cinemas has announced its plan to enhance 52 locations ahead of the release of Disney/Lightstorm's film Avatar: Fire and Ash, set to hit theaters on December 19th. The upgrades will occur in various locations including Louisville, Colo., and Burbank, Calif. RealD, a top 3D cinema technology company, is collaborating with CJ 4DPLEX, known for their innovative work, to carry out the enhancements.
